ai.error: OPENAI_API_KEY or LLM_MODEL is not configured

{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [{"login": "Pirikara", "type": "reporter"}], "credits_detailed": [{"state": "accepted", "type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/65005408?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Pirikara/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Pirikara/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Pirikara/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Pirikara/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Pirikara", "id": 65005408, "login": "Pirikara", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjY1MDA1NDA4", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Pirikara/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Pirikara/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Pirikara/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Pirikara/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Pirikara/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Pirikara", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45157", "cvss": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-284"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-284", "name": "Improper Access Control"}], "description": "### Impact
When a malicious user has access to a file share of a user, they could use this share token to also access the chunking upload directly and see temporary part files during on going uploads.

### Patches

It is recommended that the Nextcloud Server is upgraded to 32.0.9 or 33.0.3
It is recommended that the Nextcloud Enterprise Server is upgraded to 26.0.13.26, 27.1.11.25, 28.0.14.17, 29.0.16.16, 30.0.17.9, 31.0.14.5, 32.0.9 or 33.0.3

### Workarounds

* No workaround available

### References


* [HackerOne](https://hackerone.com/reports/3483708)
* [PullRequest](https://github.com/nextcloud/server/pull/59780)

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:

* Create a post in [nextcloud/security-advisories](https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/discussions)
* Customers: Open a support ticket at [portal.nextcloud.com](https://portal.nextcloud.com)", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-45pj-p7x7-4mhc", "html_url": title: Valid share tokens allow to access tempory upload files of share owner
